Item.name: گۆڕینی گشتی لە گشت بەڵگەنامە كراوەكان
گەڕان لە گشتی لە گشت بەڵگەنامە كراوەكان
Treat each line as a separate string
Draw a coloured bar on active tab
Show close button on each tab
Exit on close the last tab
Hide menu bar (use Alt or F10 key to toggle)
Disable advanced scrolling feature (if you have touchpad problem)
Open all files of folder instead of launching Folder as Workspace on folder dropping
Treat backslash as escape character for SQL
Enable session snapshot and periodic backup
Remember current session for next launch
Open session in a new instance of Nextpad++
* The modification of this setting needs to restart Nextpad++
Use default Word character list as it is
Add your character as part of word (don't choose it unless you know what you're doing)
Set your cloud location path here:
Scroll to the last line after update
Show only filename in title bar
Run until the end of file
Depoya git tune\nJi bo vekirina depoyekê "Browse" bikar bîne.
Dosya danişînê ya hilbijartî tu tabloyan dihewîne.
Pêşî bi karanîna Destpêk Tomarkirinê makroyek tomar bikin.
Rêya pelê ya tevahî di barika sernavê de nîşan bide
Nakokiyên kurtebirî ji bo vê babetê tune.
Ji bo barkirina pêvekên sazkirî serîlêdanê ji nû ve bidin destpêkirin.
Ji dîskê ji nû ve barkirin
Nikare Ji bo Nûvekirinan Kontrol bike
Ev ê pelên pêvekê jê bibe.
Pêşî makroyek tomar bikin û hilînin.
Navê fermanê ji bo menuya Run
Metna nîşankirî li klîpboardê hate kopî kirin.
Ji bo kopîkirinê nivîsa nîşankirî tune.
Di Projeyan de biguherînin: Hîn ne girêdayî ye.
Di Projeyan de Bibînin: Hîn bi lîsteya pelê Panela Projeyê ve nehatiye girêdan.
Ma hûn dixwazin guhertinan tomar bikin?
Ji bo girtina tabê du caran bikirtînin
Bişkoka girtina li ser tabloyan nîşan bide
Hilpekînan di çend rêzan de nîşan bide
Dîtina panelê li seranserê danişînan bi bîr bîne
Di danişînê de têketinên pelan ên tunebûyî bihêlin
Pejirandin Biguherîne Hemî di belgeyên vekirî de
de tîpên monospace bikar bîninRast-klîk bijartinê dimîne
Rêza tarîx/demê ya xwerû berevajî bike
Parskerên lîsteya fonksiyonên XML-ê bikar bînin
Di hilbijartinê de sînorê kontrolkirina otomatîkî (bytes):
Pelê XML-a mijara Nextpad++ hilbijêrin ku hûn bicîh bikin
Divê nirxên rêzê 0-255 bin û destpêk divê <= dawî be.
Nextpad++ ji nû ve bidin destpêkirin da ku konteksta xwerû Menu.xml ji nû ve çêbike.
Di pelê de guhertinên neparastkirî hene.Ji nû ve barkirina bi kodkirina nû dê wan ji holê rake.Berdewamkirin?

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Editing contextMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Editing contextMenu.xml allows you to modify your Nextpad++ popup context menu. You have to restart your Nextpad++ to take effect after modifying contextMenu.xml.

NppHelpAbsentWarning.title: File does not exist
NppHelpAbsentWarning.message: doesn't exist. Please download it on Nextpad++ site.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Save Current Modification
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
You should save the current modification. All the saved modifications can not be undone.
Continue?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Lose Undo Ability Warning
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
You should save the current modification. All the saved modifications can not be undone.
Continue?

CannotMoveDoc.title: Move to new Nextpad++ Instance
CannotMoveDoc.message: Document is modified, save it then try again.

DocReloadWarning.title: Reload
DocReloadWarning.message: Are you sure you want to reload the current file and lose the changes made in Nextpad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Save failed
FileLockedWarning.message: Please check whether if this file is opened in another program

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: The file is already opened in Nextpad++.

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Amount of files to open is too large
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Settings on Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: It seems the path of settings on cloud is set on a read only drive, or on a folder needed privilege right for writing access. Your settings on cloud will be canceled. Please reset a coherent value via Preference dialog.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: File Open
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: The file you're trying to open doesn't exist.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: Could not Load Session
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Session file is either corrupted or not valid.

word-chars-list-tip.value: This allows you to include additional character into current word characters while double clicking for selection or searching with "Match whole word only" option checked.

cloud-restart-warning.value: Please restart Nextpad++ to take effect.

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Use Shift + Enter to search in the opposite direction
